_meta.generated_for: ROAS KPI card drill-down (data only, no UI)
_meta.formula: ROAS = [(web_leads + 0.5*phone_leads) * (conversion_pct/100) * LTV] / ad_spend -- same formula as the live ROAS view (nectar/roas.py). Two LTV flavors: standard (lifetime_value_agg) and conservative (lifetime_value, move-out based).

spend_source_meaning.verified_supermetrics_override: Real per-month spend figure verified against a live Supermetrics Google Ads pull. Only 2026-06 currently has this.
spend_source_meaning.recurring_budget_assumed: The facility's CURRENT recurring monthly ad budget (facilities_import.psv) applied to a historical month -- a real configured number, but an ASSUMPTION that spend was constant at that level in that month, not a verified historical figure.

ltv_source_meaning.live_db_facility_day: LTV as already stored in portfolio.db from an earlier session's live MSR replay at that month-end.
ltv_source_meaning.live_historical_msr_replay: LTV freshly live-fetched THIS session via one MSR call per facility per month at that month's end date (completed months are immutable -- real historical state, not an estimate).

_meta.excluded_current_month: the in-flight partial month is excluded from ROAS -- ad spend and LTV are only meaningful for a complete month.
_meta.not_included: Wider ad-platform fields (Clicks/Impressions/CTR/Avg CPC) -- blocked this session, see drilldown_ga4_ads_BLOCKED.json. This dataset is ROAS-formula output only, never Google's own conversion-value tracking (see README.md's metric-identity clarification -- do not conflate).
